web_data.description: Sugar.fit is a health-tech startup focused on managing and reversing Type 2 diabetes and pre-diabetes. It utilizes a data-driven approach combining continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) technology, personalized coaching, and lifestyle interventions to help users regulate blood sugar levels.
web_data.target_audience: Individuals with Type 2 diabetes, pre-diabetic patients, and health-conscious individuals focused on metabolic health.

web_data.description: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited is a Fortune 500 Maharatna Indian public sector undertaking under the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas, engaged in refining crude oil and marketing petroleum products through a vast network of retail outlets.
web_data.target_audience: Individual motorists, households, industrial enterprises, airlines, and commercial transport operators.
